mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM student WHERE id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT e.*,d.name as clazzName from student e left join clazz d on e.clazz_id = d.id
e.name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
and e.clazz_id like concat('%',#{clazzId},'%')
and e.degree like concat('%',#{degree},'%')
order by e.update_time desc

SELECT (CASE WHEN s.degree = '1' THEN "初中" WHEN s.degree = '2' THEN "高中" WHEN s.degree = '3' THEN "大专" WHEN s.degree = '4' THEN "本科" WHEN s.degree = '5' THEN "硕士" WHEN s.degree = '6' THEN "博士" END )AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM student s GROUP BY s.degree
SELECT c.name pos, count(*) num FROM student s LEFT JOIN clazz c ON s.clazz_id = c.id GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY num
